review_body: I have never bought a mattress online before. I wasn't sure how it would arrive. But it was rolled in a tube and packed in a way that I could move the box myself. It was easy to remove the packaging and had clear instructions on how to unwrap the mattress and let it reach its full state.

Was looking for something affordable that wasn't just some cheap mattress for my child's room. Delivered a day early, it is a spring mattress, took about two days for the foam part to fully decompress from being packed inside of a box. I was a little intimidated, but it was no hassle, easy to unbox and pretty comfy for snuggles
The only thing I would recommend is that Walmart use another service other than OnTrac for delivery. Waited all day for delivery and it wasn't delivered until 7:30 PM.

I absolutely love this bed. I would recommend this to anyone I have Arthritis stenosis lumbar and cervical and suffer tremendously. I normally sleep in a recliner and I ordered this bed. And moved into a new apartment. Put it together myself and I love it. I will tell everyone I know they need this bed. Thank you very much for providing this for me.

I'm not sure if this is the correct size. It inflated quickly once taken out of the box. I'm not sure of whether or not I'm supposed to take the plastic off as a requirement for full inflation, or if leaving it on is fine. Also not sure of how long to allow it to inflate, I don't see any instructions. I'm considering a return but I suppose I'll give it a couple of hours before I truly decide. The mattress feels firm, decent. Too soon to tell… I will update this post soon!

after opening the vacuum sealing there was a hole on the bottom side close to the stitching in the corner. we figured a sheet would cover it . my daughter sleep on this bed and ended up with a horrible rash. doctor said chemical burn. we assumed maybe it was her skin, shes sensitive. so we trade the brand new mattress for her with her brothers used one. neither ended up with the same rash the next morning, except on his face. his eyes were swollen shut.Walmart won't refund it without it being sent back, no problem there is a health hazard for us at this point, but it came vacuumed sealed, how an i suppose to return this mattress with no vehicle ? then they offered to just leave it outside as is and shipping drivers will come for it.I live in a suburb with an HOA and they would never allow me to place a mattress on my porch for 24-48 hours. so I'm just going to end up tossing it. definitely don't get for your younger ones!

Bought this for my son‘s twin bed. We bought him the Batmobile bedframe, so the bed would be on the floor. And now, so is he. The second you put a pound of pressure on this mattress flattened to the ground. You can feel every single spring. Except for the springs, and the outer layer I'm not sure there's any substance to this mattress. DO NOT BUY THIS TO SAVE MONEY.

Bought this smashes for my mom and ended up putting it in the upstairs storage because you could feel springs all over the place as soon as you sit down it's not thick. You feel every metal spring when you sit or lay on it. It's very uncomfortable no support whatsoever. Maybe that's why it was so cheap.

Walmart's service was AWFUL. The mattress is extraordinarily uncomfortable, and when I tried to return it, Walmart cancelled the return pickup 5 times. Last time I tried, they told me pick up was never available and , if I wanted a return, I needed to drop off the product myself. Extremely unproffessional behaviour.

Had to buy an "emergency" twin mattress for a guest that would have ruined the more pricey, Serta medium-firm, I had on the bed (due to being a heavy smoker). So I quickly ordered this budget mattress for under $100.00. I had no intention of saving/keeping this mattress after the guest left, because it would smell of cigarette smoke. That having been said, this mattress is definitely designed for a child. Anyone weighing more than 100 Lbs. will feel the springs and sleep uncomfortably. Unless this is a purchase for a child--spend a bit more and get a better mattress. Thank you for reading my review.

Terrible mattress. Super thin with little to no support. You can feel the inner springs through the fabric. Less than 100 lbs and you can literally hit the box spring when you sit down We are having to replace it not 5 months later. Fine for display only do not waste your money.

For the price it's ok! 😏If your out of options BUT,... 🤨If your idea was firmness or comfort forget about it! 🫤 The top layer may as well be paper. Yup that thin! you feel (and by the pics) See every spring!... and hear too!, 😐Which you know....helps for sleeping...! 🧐My Advice: Spend a few more bucks and get something better. Zinus really dropped the balls in these last few yrs. ☹️Shame!

This mattress looks nice in the picture but it disappoints in real life. Looks and feels cheap and uncomfortable. You can definitely feel the springs. It's basically an oversized crib mattress and it doesn't fully fit the bed frame. I was disappointed when I saw it.

It took longer than expected. It kept rescheduling delivery and was off by a few days, which threw off my assembly schedule and I still haven't gotten that worked out yet they keep bringing out one person, but tell me that two is needed, and they are having to reschedule so it has been an inconvenience.

This is the 2nd one I purchased and I'm very displeased. I thought the problem was in the bed itself but the mattress 'broke down' on the edge after just a few weeks giving me back problems. The break down is where I set down to swing my legs up on the bed.

Mattress arrived rolled in box. I unpacked it and let it lay on bed foundation for 3 nights as directed. And then…… Mattress completely collapes when I set on it. Not med-firm as stated. It does not meet the weight as described. This was a bad purchase for me to make, however I am sleeping on it as I have nothing else to sleep on. Therefore I will keep it until I can get another.

We bought it for my son's dorm. The mattress was at good price, but lacks support to the back. The mattress sinks as soon as I sit on it and I'm only around 100 pounds. I would like to return it but it requests to be taken to the store or repack it for free pick up. It's not possible for us to repack this mattress because it came in a tightly bundled roll and spread to full size after we opened the package. Now we are stuck with this one and need to think about how we can dispose it.

THE MATTRESS COMES COMPRESSED.......... IT WILL TAKE BETWEEN 48-72 HOURS TO DECOMPRESS........... BECAREFUL WHEN YOU OPEN THE CARTOON SO AS NOT TO DAMAGE THE MATTRESS............ IT PLUMPS UP REALLY NICE ONCE ALL IS SAID AND DONE............ IT IS NICE AND FIRM WITH A GEL PAD IN THE MATERIAL FOR A FULL NIGHTS SLEEP............ EASY SET-UP...... STAND BACK AS THEY SAY IT KNOW KUNG FU.............. HEHEHEHE HIGHLY RECOMMEND................

Got this for my son's floor bed. Not sure if it's because I'm used to sleeping on memory foam mattresses but because the top layer is so thin I can feel every single spring. It does fit the bed frame perfectly and I like the height my toddler son sleeps fine on it but as an adult I wouldn't get this for myself or anyone over 100lbs. Maybe a separately topper would help.

I bought this mattress for a 6-month stay at a temporary address. I am "camping out" and do not intend to keep the mattress after the 6 months. As a temporary mattress, it is okay, but I would not recommend it for ongoing use. Too soft, and you can feel the springs when you move your sleeping positions.

It's inexpensive but don't expect it to be like a high end mattress. It is very firm but is very jiggly. If you sleep with a partner, any movement will shake them and their movement will shake you. I got the 8 inch mattress and a 4 inch foam topper. I also don't expect this to last 10 years. It might be great for a guest room though.

Two months ago, I requested a refund from Walmart, but I still haven't received it. The customer service experience was frustrating - they passed the blame around, and despite calling multiple times, I was told that my request wasn't escalated as claimed. Buyer beware: Walmart's refund process is a nightmare. Avoid ordering from them if you can.

Even after letting it sit for 38 hours it was significantly deformed. One side completely collapses when you put any pressure on it and the whole mattress has a wave to it. Terrible product. Buying mattresses online is already skeptical and products like these are exactly why.

Extremely comfortable - I've been sleeping on one of these for 14 years now, and just got another for a day bed in my guest room. Comes rolled up in a box, vacuum packed, with a cute warning card because if you're not careful opening the package, it will explode on you. :) Just go slow.

Worst mattress ever. Bought the 6 inch mattress to put on my daybed. The springs were terrible and felt like you were on an awful air mattress as soon as someone else sat down. No padding whatsoever. Had to transport and bring to a Walmart store for return. Do not waste your time with this mattress.

It's very uncomfortable, took too long to ship, not worth the money, coils can be felt through top of the mattress %26 it doesn't fit in the twin XL bed frame l purchased from a competitor of Walmart since I couldn't find a single bed frame my daughter %26 I wanted to have delivered same or next day. Now I can't return it because it's been taken out of the vacuum seal so I'll just have to take the loss and purchase another mattress from somewhere else. Thanks for nothing Walmart

***BED BUG WARNING *** I received 2 items from the Wal-Mart Warehouse with Bed Bugs Wal-Mart refuses to help me. I have spent $100s to get rid of the BEDBUGS and ZERO rcompensation. ***DO NOT BUY BEDDING ITEMS SHIPPED FROM WAL-MART WAREHOUSE ***

Bought these for grandchildren and their new bunk beds at Grammy and Papa's house. They love them, sleep well and are ready to come back. They pop open out of the box easily, and are full size in a day.

was the worst mattress i ever slept on. mattress was to thin and never completely filled out.material was loose on mattress. mattress had too much movement. itwas the worst. I had to purchase another mattress it was a waist of my money.

The mattess itself is different…If u get any marker stain on it, it is hard to clean off, I tried to clean off a marker stain my baby cousin had put on my bed and it left a yellow colored stain on my bed and it won't go away.
The matress is comfortable. The only problem was that the unwrapping instructions were wrapped inside. I had to completely unwrap it to get the unwrapping instructions. They were funny, though.

bed was all but ready when taken out of box children like them for the bunkbeds good value for money elsewhere $15 $20 more plus shipping was free for this items it was a bed in box but was easy box was heavy thou.

I got this to go under a mattress. But i know I would not want this to be my mattress I lay on. Very thin, probably feel the springs. This was inexpensive, tho, not worth it . Spend a bit more on something you can actually sleep on.
Every movement felt the inner springs. Had to buy mattresses topper. Had I known that I would have purchased a different one. I would not recommend this mattress.
I bought this mattress for my grandson , it is very thin and you can feel the springs in it , definitely would not ever buy this again or recommend this to anyone either!!!
I bought 2 of these for my kids. The product works great, especially for the price. I will be buying these again once these 2 are ruined. Im sure ill get a few good years out of them first tho.

I got this to go under a mattress. But i know I would not want this to be my mattress I lay on. Very thin, probably feel the springs. This was inexpensive, tho, not worth it . Spend a bit more on something you can actually sleep on.
Every movement felt the inner springs. Had to buy mattresses topper. Had I known that I would have purchased a different one. I would not recommend this mattress.
I bought this mattress for my grandson , it is very thin and you can feel the springs in it , definitely would not ever buy this again or recommend this to anyone either!!!
I bought 2 of these for my kids. The product works great, especially for the price. I will be buying these again once these 2 are ruined. Im sure ill get a few good years out of them first tho.
I was amazed for the price really good quality the stitching around the the mattress is done with double stitching. I feel like for heavier person purchase the mattress pad as well for extra padding.
Not firm at all it's medium to soft , I have return it. But returned process was very smooth and no hassle. Thanks Walmart for great customer service
the person I bought it for says you can feel the springs. She doesn't weigh a hundred pounds. She is sleeping in a recliner instead. My advice is, don't waste your money on this.

For the price we paid, we were surprised at how comfortable the mattress was. We have a full bed with a really outdated mattress. We did not want to spend hundreds on a set when the bed is only slept on a couple times a year.

My twin Mattress arrived well packaged, that was the only concern. I am glad that it was. The mattress fitted perfectly and I went to Walmart to buy a fitted sheet the next day. I saved money to boot. Thanks Walmart.

Worst Experience Ever. The incompetence of Walmart employees was mind boggling. Walmart chose no responsibility of the lost merchandise and even advised me that I should walk around the neighborhood to see if I could find out if it was delivered to wrong address?? That is illegal and a crime in California. You can't go onto someone else's property without permission and take items that you think are yours! Walmart even has that on their own website that it's okay to do it without consent, I guess they're taking responsibility if a neighbor believes you're a porch pirate and protects what he believes is right. No wonder Walmart has so many open lawsuits against the company. They just don't care about the safety and efficacy of their customers. Please post this, although nothing will change

As a DV victim turned thriver, this will is the first mattress in my life that hadn't been urinated on by an alcoholic. It's the best sleep I've ever had but also my two dogs and two cats as well. Highly recommend Zinus 10/10
